# Forum digest: "A few statement rows get the wrong category or payee"

Collected from a user support thread. In every case the money moved correctly;
only the derived label is wrong - the category, the sub-tag, or the counterparty
name - and only on a handful of unusual row shapes. Three representative posts,
lightly anonymized, then a maintainer note.

---

**mango_saver** -
> Two rows on this month's statement look off. A credit whose reference note is
> nothing but a long all-numeric string used to show up as a cheque deposit and
> now it just reads as a generic transfer. Separately, my salary credit - whose
> narration is a bare numeric code and nothing else - has stopped picking up the
> salary sub-tag it always had.

**rk_ontheroad** -
> Mine is the name field, not the category. On transfers whose narration opens
> with a direction word ahead of the name, the counterparty now comes back
> empty or wrong. Ordinary transfers that don't open that way are still
> labelled fine; it's only that leading-keyword narration style.

**auditlens** -
> Bill transfers that use a slash-delimited reference are pulling the wrong
> payee. When the reference is laid out as four fields - a type, a sub-type, a
> numeric reference, then the payee name as the final field - the app is lifting
> the numeric reference into the name column instead of the actual name sitting
> at the end.

---

**Maintainer note.** Consolidating these. Each one sits on an edge form that
everyday rows rarely produce, which is why routine activity looks healthy and
nothing tripped in review. On top of the three above we reproduced one more in
the same family: an offsetting credit that arrives immediately after its
matching debit is being recorded as a bounce rather than the reversal it
really is.

The labeling logic is deterministic - the same row always maps to the same
label - so each complaint can be recreated from a single synthetic row and
chased to the exact rule at fault. Expect the faults to sit on boundaries and
structural offsets inside otherwise-correct rules, not in the common paths.

**Ask for engineering:** restore correct handling so these edge rows label
correctly again, without shifting any row that already comes out right. Success
is that the situations described here enrich correctly and nothing that is
currently correct changes.

1: import pandas as pd
2: import numpy as np
3: from scipy.spatial.distance import pdist, squareform
4: from Levenshtein import jaro_winkler, distance
5: from scipy.cluster.hierarchy import linkage, cut_tree, dendrogram
6: import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
7: import traceback
8: 
9: 
10: def getmode(txn):
11:     unique_amount_df = txn.amount.unique()
12:     txn.reset_index().set_index('amount').loc[unique_amount_df, 'index'].values
13:     return 
14: 
15: 
16: def salary_detection(transactions):
17:     try:
18:         #assign empty string to cells with null values
19:         transactions['partyName'] = transactions['partyName'].fillna("")
20: 
21:         #grouping of data by similar party names
22:         STOP_WORDS_PARTYNAME = "privatelimited|private|limited|pvtltd"
23:         transactions['party2'] = transactions['partyName'].replace(to_replace=" ", value="", regex=True).str.lower().replace(to_replace=STOP_WORDS_PARTYNAME, value="", regex=True).str.strip()
24:         # grouping using clustering
25:         distance_matrix = squareform(pdist(transactions['party2'].values.reshape(-1,1), lambda x, y : distance(x[0], y[0])))
26:         
27:         # For testing purpose only
28:         # dend = dendrogram(linkage(distance_matrix, method  = "complete"))
29:         # plt.title('Dendrogram')
30:         # plt.xlabel('Customers')
31:         # plt.ylabel('Euclidean distances')
32:         # plt.show()
33:         
34:         transactions['Group_ID'] = cut_tree(linkage(distance_matrix, method='complete'), height=1.5)
35: 
36:         #finding the probable salary txns set
37:         NOT_SALARY = "XX4700.*Mobi|Mobi.*XX4700|credit card/|Deposit / Investment|MOB/TPFT/"
38:         LOAN_POSITIVE = "\\binsta\\s?loan|SHUBHLOANS|DISBUR-|\\besloan|\\bloan\\b|disbur\\s?s|disbur|disbu\\b|cashbean fund tr|NODAL A/C|NODAL Ac|NODALAC|KisshtFund|NODAL A C|ICICI BANK NODA"
39:         EXCLUDE_DEPOSIT = "CASH_DEPOSIT|FIXED_DEPOSIT|SELF_DEPOSIT|CASH_DEPOSIT_CHARGES|DEPOSITORY_CHARGES|FLEXI_DEPOSIT|INTEREST_ON_DEPOSIT|RECURRING_DEPOSIT"   # All the deposits except cheque deposit will be excluded from salary txn
40:        
41:         # filtering out txns to create sub txn dataframe for salary detection
42:         transactions_sub = transactions[transactions['type'].eq("CREDIT") & transactions['description'].notnull() & transactions['amount'].gt(2999)]
43:         transactions_sub = transactions_sub[~transactions_sub['transactionSubcategory'].isin(["INTERNAL_PAYMENT", "INVESTMENT_INCOME", "TRANSFER_FROM_WALLET", "EMI_MORATORIUM", "RENT", "REIMBURSEMENT", "SUBSIDIES", "RENT_INCOME"])]
44:         transactions_sub = transactions_sub[~transactions_sub['merchantType'].isin(["Pension"])]
45:         transactions_sub = transactions_sub[~transactions_sub['transactionCategory'].isin(["CASHBACK", "AUTO_PAYMENT_BOUNCE", "BANK_ACCOUNT_CLOSURE", "UPI", "IMPS","AUTO_SWEEP"])]
46:         transactions_sub = transactions_sub[~transactions_sub['transactionCategory'].str.contains("REVERSAL|RETURN|INTEREST|REFUND|CANCEL", na=False)]
47:         transactions_sub = transactions_sub[~transactions_sub['transactionCategory'].str.contains(EXCLUDE_DEPOSIT, na = False, case=False)]
48:         transactions_sub = transactions_sub[~transactions_sub['description'].str.contains(LOAN_POSITIVE, na=False, case=False)]
49:         transactions_sub = transactions_sub[~transactions_sub['description'].str.contains(NOT_SALARY, na=False, case=False)]
50:         transactions_sub = transactions_sub[transactions_sub['partyName'].str.len().gt(0) & transactions_sub['partyName'].notnull()]
51: 
52:         # remove txns with salary amount more than 30000 and divisible by 10000
53:         transactions_sub = transactions_sub[~(transactions_sub['amount'].gt(30000) & transactions['amount'].mod(10000).eq(0))]
54:         
55:         #transforming date into YYYY-MM form
56:         transactions['dateSal'] = pd.to_datetime(transactions['transactionDate'], format="%d/%m/%Y").dt.to_period('M')
57:         # calculate month_freq
58:         month_freq = len(transactions.groupby('dateSal'))
59: 
60:         #Find whether salary detected or not
61:         salaryDetect = "SALARY" in transactions.transactionSubcategory.values
62: 
63:         # Scenario 1 - when salary detect is FALSE
64:         if salaryDetect == False and len(transactions_sub) > 0:
65:             #CASE 1.1 - Assigning salary based on same amount repeating more than 1
66:             mode_amount = transactions_sub.amount.mode().max()
67:             mode_freq = transactions_sub.amount.value_counts().max()
68:             if mode_freq > 1:
69:                 mode_group_id = transactions_sub[transactions_sub['amount'].eq(mode_amount)].iloc[0].Group_ID
70:                 conditions_choices = [
71:                     [transactions.amount.eq(mode_amount) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") & transactions.Group_ID.eq(mode_group_id), "SALARY"]
72:                 ]
73:                 df = pd.DataFrame(data=conditions_choices, columns=['conditions', 'choices'])
74:                 transactions['transactionSubcategory'] = np.select(df['conditions'], df['choices'], default=transactions.transactionSubcategory)
75:             else:
76:                 #CASE 1.2 - Assigning salary based on highest amount with frequent Party Name respectively
77:                 transactions_sub_desc = transactions_sub.sort_values('amount', ascending=False)
78:                 for i, transaction_sub_desc in transactions_sub_desc.iterrows():
79:                     salary_partyName = transaction_sub_desc.partyName
80:                     salary_groupid = transaction_sub_desc.Group_ID
81:                     name_freq = len(transactions[transactions['Group_ID'].eq(salary_groupid) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT")])
82:                     if name_freq >= 0.5 * month_freq:
83:                         break
84:                 if name_freq >= 0.5 * month_freq and name_freq < 2.5 * month_freq:
85:                     conditions_choices = [
86:                         [transactions.Group_ID.eq(salary_groupid) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT"), "SALARY"]
87:                     ]
88:                     df = pd.DataFrame(data=conditions_choices, columns=['conditions', 'choices'])
89:                     transactions['transactionSubcategory'] = np.select(df['conditions'], df['choices'], default=transactions.transactionSubcategory)
90:             #Scenario 1.3 - Again detecting the salary from the transaction not having partyName, so that frequent salary are same 
91:             # and the 1st level category is same and month_freq == mode_freq_sub1
92:             salary_freq = len(transactions[transactions['transactionSubcategory'].eq("SALARY")])
93:             if month_freq > 1 and salary_freq < month_freq : 
94:                 transactions_subType = transactions[transactions['type'].eq("CREDIT") & transactions['description'].notnull() & transactions['amount'].gt(2999)]
95:                 transactions_subType = transactions_subType[~transactions_subType['transactionSubcategory'].isin(["INTERNAL_PAYMENT", "INVESTMENT_INCOME", "TRANSFER_FROM_WALLET", "EMI_MORATORIUM", "RENT", "REIMBURSEMENT", "SUBSIDIES", "RENT_INCOME"])]
96:                 transactions_subType = transactions_subType[~transactions_subType['merchantType'].isin(["Pension"])]
97:                 transactions_subType = transactions_subType[~transactions_subType['transactionCategory'].isin(["CASHBACK", "AUTO_PAYMENT_BOUNCE", "BANK_ACCOUNT_CLOSURE", "UPI", "IMPS","AUTO_SWEEP"])]
98:                 transactions_subType = transactions_subType[~transactions_subType['transactionCategory'].str.contains("REVERSAL|RETURN|INTEREST|REFUND|CANCEL", na=False)]
99:                 transactions_subType = transactions_subType[~transactions_subType['transactionCategory'].str.contains(EXCLUDE_DEPOSIT, na = False, case=False)]
100:                 transactions_subType = transactions_subType[~transactions_subType['description'].str.contains(LOAN_POSITIVE, na=False, case=False)]
101:                 transactions_subType = transactions_subType[~transactions_subType['description'].str.contains(NOT_SALARY, na=False, case=False)]
102:                 mode_amount_subType = transactions_subType.amount.mode().max()
103:                 mode_freq_subType = transactions_subType.amount.value_counts().max()
104:                 category = transactions_subType.transactionCategory.mode().max()
105:                 if mode_freq_subType == month_freq and mode_freq_subType > 1 :
106:                     conditions_choices = [
107:                         [transactions.amount.eq(mode_amount_subType) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") & transactions.transactionCategory.eq(category), "SALARY"]
108:                     ]
109:                     df = pd.DataFrame(data=conditions_choices, columns=['conditions', 'choices'])
110:                     transactions['transactionSubcategory'] = np.select(df['conditions'], df['choices'], default=transactions.transactionSubcategory)
111: 
112: 
113:         #Scenario 2 - when salary detect is TRUE 
114:         #checking whether salary was detected in Scenario 1 or salary detected initially from older scripts
115:         salaryDetect = "SALARY" in transactions.transactionSubcategory.values
116:         if salaryDetect == True:
117:             salary_partyName = transactions[transactions['partyName'].ne("") & transactions['transactionSubcategory'].eq("SALARY")].filter(items=['partyName', 'transactionDate', 'amount', 'Group_ID']).sort_values('partyName', ascending=False)
118:             if len(salary_partyName) > 0:
119:                 for i, transaction in transactions.iterrows():
120:                     for j, sal_partyName in salary_partyName.iterrows():
121:                         if transaction.Group_ID == sal_partyName.Group_ID and transaction.type == "CREDIT" and transaction.transactionCategory not in ["UPI", "IMPS"]:
122:                             transactions.at[i, 'transactionSubcategory'] = "SALARY"
123: 
124:             #assigning reimbursement for those salary txns where party name is not present
125:             salary_no_partyname = transactions[transactions['transactionSubcategory'].eq("SALARY") & transactions['partyName'].eq("")] 
126:             if len(salary_no_partyname) > 0:
127:                 salary_max = salary_no_partyname.amount.max()
128:                 conditions_choices = [
129:                     [transactions.transactionSubcategory.eq("SALARY") & transactions.partyName.eq("") & transactions.amount.lt(0.3*salary_max), "REIMBURSEMENT"]
130:                 ]
131:                 df = pd.DataFrame(data=conditions_choices, columns=['conditions', 'choices'])
132:                 transactions['transactionSubcategory'] = np.select(df['conditions'], df['choices'], default=transactions.transactionSubcategory)
133: 
134:             # assigning reimbursement based on max salary amount & group_id where party name is present
135:             for i, transaction in transactions.iterrows():
136:                 if transaction.transactionSubcategory == "SALARY" and transaction.partyName != "":
137:                     salary_max_groupid = transaction.Group_ID
138:                     salary_max = transactions[transactions['Group_ID'].eq(salary_max_groupid)].amount.max()
139:                     if transaction.amount < 0.3 * salary_max and transaction.amount < 20000:
140:                         transactions.at[i, 'transactionSubcategory'] = "REIMBURSEMENT"
141: 
142:             #SECOND SALARY
143:             #Looking for second salary only when previous salary is less than 80% of month_freq
144:             salary_freq = len(transactions[transactions['transactionSubcategory'].eq("SALARY")])
145:             if salary_freq < 0.8*month_freq:
146:                 #finding the probable salary txns set again for second salary
147:                 transactions_sub = transactions[transactions['type'].eq("CREDIT") & transactions['description'].notnull() & transactions['amount'].gt(2999)]
148:                 transactions_sub = transactions_sub[~transactions_sub['transactionSubcategory'].isin(["INTERNAL_PAYMENT", "INVESTMENT_INCOME", "TRANSFER_FROM_WALLET", "INSURANCE_CLAIM", "EMI_MORATORIUM", "RENT", "REIMBURSEMENT", "SUBSIDIES", "RENT_INCOME"])]
149:                 transactions_sub = transactions_sub[~transactions_sub['merchantType'].isin(["Pension"])]
150:                 transactions_sub = transactions_sub[~transactions_sub['transactionCategory'].isin(["CASHBACK", "AUTO_PAYMENT_BOUNCE", "BANK_ACCOUNT_CLOSURE", "UPI", "IMPS","AUTO_SWEEP"])]
151:                 transactions_sub = transactions_sub[~transactions_sub['transactionCategory'].str.contains("REVERSAL|RETURN|INTEREST|REFUND|CANCEL", na=False)]
152:                 transactions_sub = transactions_sub[~transactions_sub['transactionCategory'].str.contains(EXCLUDE_DEPOSIT, na = False, case=False)]
153:                 transactions_sub = transactions_sub[~transactions_sub['description'].str.contains(LOAN_POSITIVE, na=False, case=False)]
154:                 transactions_sub = transactions_sub[~transactions_sub['description'].str.contains(NOT_SALARY, na=False, case=False)]
155:                 transactions_sub = transactions_sub[transactions_sub['partyName'].str.len().gt(0) & transactions_sub['partyName'].notnull()]
156: 
157:                 transactions_sub = transactions_sub[~(transactions_sub['amount'].gt(30000) & transactions['amount'].mod(10000).eq(0))]
158: 
159:                 #CASE 2.1 Checking for second salary based on freq
160:                 transactions_sub_desc_not_sal = transactions_sub[transactions_sub.transactionSubcategory.ne("SALARY")].sort_values('partyName', ascending=False)
161:                 if len(transactions_sub_desc_not_sal)>0:
162:                     txn_sub_desc_not_sal_length = len(transactions_sub_desc_not_sal)
163:                     for i in range(txn_sub_desc_not_sal_length):
164:                         salary_partyName = transactions_sub_desc_not_sal.iloc[i].partyName
165:                         salary_groupid = transactions_sub_desc_not_sal.iloc[i].Group_ID
166:                         name_freq = len(transactions[transactions['Group_ID'].eq(salary_groupid) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT")])
167:                         if name_freq > 1:
168:                             break
169:                     if name_freq > 1 and name_freq < 2.5 * month_freq:
170:                         conditions_choices = [
171:                             [transactions.Group_ID.eq(salary_groupid) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT"), "SALARY"]
172:                         ]
173:                         df = pd.DataFrame(data=conditions_choices, columns=['conditions', 'choices'])
174:                         transactions['transactionSubcategory'] = np.select(df['conditions'], df['choices'], default=transactions.transactionSubcategory)
175: 
176:                 #CASE 2.2 checking for second salary only based on average amount & if salary freq is less than 80% of month_freq
177:                 salary_freq = len(transactions[transactions['transactionSubcategory'].eq("SALARY")])
178: 
179:                 if salary_freq < 0.8 * month_freq:
180:                     salary_average = transactions[transactions['transactionSubcategory'].eq("SALARY")].amount.mean()
181:                     if len(transactions_sub) > 0:
182:                         for i, transaction in transactions_sub.iterrows():
183:                             if (transaction.amount >= 0.65 * salary_average and transaction.amount <= 1.6 * salary_average) and transaction.type == "CREDIT":
184:                                 transactions_sub.at[i, 'transactionSubcategory'] = "SALARY"
185: 
186:                 #filtering for only salary transactions
187:                 transactions_sub = transactions_sub[transactions_sub['transactionSubcategory'].eq('SALARY')]
188:                 #assigning second salary & reimbursement based on Group_id
189:                 if len(transactions_sub) > 0:
190:                     for i, transaction in transactions.iterrows():
191:                         for j, transaction_sub in transactions_sub.iterrows():
192:                             if transaction.Group_ID == transaction_sub.Group_ID:
193:                                 if transaction.transactionCategory not in ["UPI", "IMPS"] and transaction.type == "CREDIT":
194:                                     transactions.at[i, 'transactionSubcategory'] = "SALARY"
195:

198:                     if transaction.transactionSubcategory == "SALARY" and transaction.partyName != "":
199:                         salary_max_groupid = transaction.Group_ID
200:                         salary_max = transactions[transactions['Group_ID'].eq(salary_max_groupid)].amount.max()
201:                         if transaction.amount <  0.3 * salary_max and transaction.amount < 20000:
202:                             transactions.at[i, 'transactionSubcategory'] = "REIMBURSEMENT"

207:             ]

209:             df = pd.DataFrame(data=conditions_choices, columns=['conditions', 'choices'])

import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import re
from categorizationapp.UtilityScripts.AppUtil import *
from categorizationapp.UtilityScripts.RegexConstants import *
from categorizationapp.UtilityScripts.BankRegexConstants import *

def categorize_Axis_transactions(transactions, accountType):

    conditions_choices = [
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^OPENING BALANCE", na=False, case=False) , "OPENING_BALANCE"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("CASH\\s?BACK|[Cc]ashback|/Rewarde", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") , "CASHBACK"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("BRN-FLEXI DEPOSIT|Flexi", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "FLEXI_DEPOSIT"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("FLEXI.*PRIN\\b|^Flexi|^BRN-Flexi", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT")  , "FD_PRINCIPAL_REDEMPTION"],

19:         [transactions.description.str.contains("Cancellation of DD", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT")  , "REVERSAL"],
20:         [transactions.description.str.contains("RPYRFND|REFUND", na=False, case=False) , "REFUND"],

25:         [transactions.description.str.contains("CASH DEP CHGS|charge.*cash", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "CASH_DEPOSIT_CHARGES"],
26:         [transactions.description.str.contains("ABB Charges|MIN BAL CHARGE|MINBAL", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "NMMAB_CHARGES"],

28:         [transactions.description.str.contains("INWARD RET CHQ.*chgs|Rejection Charge|inward reject|CLG REJECTS", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "CHEQUE_RETURN_PENALTY"],
29:         [transactions.description.str.contains("NEFT/RET", na=False, case=False) , "NEFT_RETURN"],
30:         [transactions.description.str.contains("RTGS Rej", na=False, case=False) , "RTGS_RETURN"],

33:         [transactions.description.str.contains("^DD$|^FOR DD$", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "DEMAND_DEPOSIT"],
34:         [transactions.description.str.contains("ATMWDL/", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "ATM_WITHDRAWAL"],
35:         [transactions.description.str.contains("^CASH|^bnadp|BY CASH|BNA CASH", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") , "CASH_DEPOSIT"],

37:         [transactions.description.str.contains("POSTXN|RPAYPOS/", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "CARD_PAYMENT"],

39:         [transactions.description.str.contains("MOBTRF", na=False, case=False), "MOBILE_BANKING"],

41:         [transactions.description.str.contains("AADHARPAYMENT", na=False, case=False), "AADHAAR_PAY"],

from categorizationapp.UtilityScripts.RegexConstants import *
from categorizationapp.UtilityScripts.BankRegexConstants import *
from categorizationapp.UtilityScripts.BankRegexConstants import *

def categorize_HDFC_transactions(transactions, accountType):

    conditions_choices = [
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^OPENING BALANCE", na=False, case=False) , "OPENING_BALANCE"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains(BANK_VER, na=False, case=False) &  transactions.amount.lt(2) , "ACCOUNT_VERIFICATION"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^ACH.*-AY20[012]|Income Tax", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") , "TAX_REFUND"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("CBDT TAX|CBDT|FD REDEEM TAX", na=False, case=False)  & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") ,"DIRECT_TAX"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^GST/|KARNATAKACTD\\b", na=False, case=False)  & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") ,"INDIRECT_TAX"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^DC EMI LOAN", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "AUTO_PAYMENT"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("CASH\\s?BACK|REWARDs|GOOG-PAYMENT|phonepeincentive", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") , "CASHBACK"],

        [transactions.description.str.contains("^\\.ACH|EMI RTN CHARG|\\bSI\\b FAIL", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "ECS_PENALTY"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^SI\\b |AUTOPAY \\bSI\\b|^EMI.*CHQ|^DC EMI LOAN|^ACH D-|^RP-|^APY\\d|^ECS D|FINEMI|H - HDB|_EMI|INVESTNOW|BFHL|BHFL|BFEM", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") , "AUTO_PAYMENT_BOUNCE"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("NEFT RETURN", na=False, case=False) , "NEFT_RETURN"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("RTGS-RETURN", na=False, case=False) , "RTGS_RETURN"],

        [transactions.description.str.contains("^\\.POS DECCHG ", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "POS_PENALTY"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^\\..*DECCHG ", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "ATM_DECLINE_CHARGES"],

        [transactions.description.str.contains("^\\.IMPS", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "IMPS_CHARGES"],

        [transactions.description.str.contains("SETTLEMENT CHARGE", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "SETTLEMENT_CHARGES"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("DEPOSITORY CHARGE", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "DEPOSITORY_CHARGES"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("\\bAMB\\b CHRG", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "NMMAB_CHARGES"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("DC INTL POS|DEBIT CARD PUR ADJ", na=False, case=False) , "FOREX_ADJUSTMENT"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("RFX.*GST|RFX.*COMM|FCY MARKUP FEE", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "FOREX_CHARGES"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("FUEL SURCHG", na=False, case=False)  & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "FUEL_SURCHARGE"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("/MCA\\b", na=False, case=False)  & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "MCA_FEES"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("BG ISSUANCE CHARGE", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "BANK_GUARANTEE_CHARGES"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("loan.*charg", na=False, case=False)  & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "LOAN_FEES"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains(BANK_CHARGES_HDFC, na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "CHARGES"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^NWD-|^EAW-|^ATW-|MICRO ATM CASH|ATM-CASH|MCTF ATW|[0-9]NWD-|[0-9]EAW-", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "ATM_WITHDRAWAL"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("CASH CHEQUE", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "CHEQUE_CASH_WITHDRAWAL"],

    transactions['partyName'] = transactions['partyName'].replace(to_replace="\\,?\\.$|/$|\\*$|\\,{1,2}$|^\\.{2}|\\s?-$|.rzp", value="", regex=True).str.strip().str.title()

    conditions_choices = [
        [transactions.transactionCategory.eq("NEFT") & transactions.partyName.str.contains("^[0-9]{10} [A-z0-9]{9} [0-9]", na=False, case=False) , ""],
        [transactions.transactionCategory.eq("UPI") & transactions.partyName.str.contains("[0-9]{9,15}", na=False, case=False) , sep_by_dash(transactions.description,2,3)],
        [transactions.transactionCategory.eq("UPI") & transactions.description.str.contains("^UPI-PAYTM-PAYTM-", na=False, case=False) , sep_by_dash(transactions.description,3,4)],
        [transactions.transactionCategory.eq("UPI") & transactions.description.str.contains("^UPI-PAYTM-", na=False, case=False) , sep_by_dash(transactions.description,2,3)],
        [transactions.transactionCategory.eq("UPI") & transactions.partyName.str.contains("[0-9]ipay$", na=False, case=False) , sep_by_dash(transactions.description,2,3)],
        [transactions.transactionCategory.eq("IMPS") & transactions.partyName.str.contains("pasfar",na=False, case=False) , sep_by_dash(transactions.description,5,6).replace(to_replace="\d+", value="", regex=True)],
        [transactions.transactionCategory.eq("IMPS") & transactions.partyName.str.contains("^razorpay$",na=False, case=False) , sep_by_dash(transactions.description,6,7).replace(to_replace="\d+", value="", regex=True)],
        [transactions.partyName.str.contains("^Na$|On Tapping|Collect From Raz|Payment From Pho|Payviarazorpay|^Upi$|^Payment$", na=False, case=False) , ""],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^SALARY", na=False, case=False) ,  transactions.partyName.str.lower().replace(to_replace="|".join(SAL_STOP_WORDS), value="", regex=True)],
        [transactions.partyName.str.contains(SAL_STOP_WORDS1, na=False, case=False), transactions.partyName.str.lower().replace(to_replace=SAL_STOP_WORDS1, value="", regex=True)]
    ]

    df = pd.DataFrame(data=conditions_choices, columns=['conditions', 'choices'])
    transactions['partyName'] = np.select(df['conditions'], df['choices'], default=transactions.partyName)

    conditions_choices = [
        [transactions.transactionCategory.eq("UPI") & transactions.partyName.str.contains("\\bADD|-GOOG-", na=False, case=False) , sep_by_dash(transactions.description,2,4)]
    ]

    df = pd.DataFrame(data=conditions_choices, columns=['conditions', 'choices'])
    transactions['partyName'] = np.select(df['conditions'], df['choices'], default=transactions.partyName)
    transactions['partyName'] = transactions['partyName'].str.title()

    #clean names for hdfc
    conditions_choices = [
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^IMPS.*-UNREGISTERED-", na=False, case=False)  , sep_by_dash(transactions.description,4,5)],
        [transactions.partyName.str.contains(HDFC_CLEAN1, na=False, case=False), ""],
        [transactions.transactionCategory.eq("TRANSFER") & transactions.partyName.str.contains("^By", na=False, case=False), transactions.partyName.replace(to_replace="^By ", value="", regex=True)],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^CC [0-9].*AUTOPAY SI-[TM]AD", na=False, case=False) , py_extract(transactions.description, pat="^CC (.*) AUTOPAY SI-[TM]AD", index=0)],
        [transactions.partyName.str.contains("Cash Paid To .*", na=False, case=False) , py_extract(transactions.partyName, pat="Cash Paid To (.*)", index=0)],
        [transactions.partyName.str.contains("^Trn?f To |^Fnf To |^Paid To |^Fund Trf To|^Amt Paid To", na=False, case=False) , py_extract(transactions.partyName, pat=" To (.*)", index=0)],
        [transactions.partyName.str.contains("^Trf ", na=False, case=False) , py_extract(transactions.partyName, pat="Trf (.*)", index=0)],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^IB BILLPAY DR-HDFCSI-", na=False, case=False) , sep_by_dash(transactions.description,2,3)],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("ccbillpay", na=False, case=False) , ""],
        [transactions.partyName.str.contains("Micr Clg|Chq Paid", na=False, case=False)  , ""],
        [transactions.partyName.str.contains("[A-Za-z]", na=False, case=False)==False , ""]
    ]

    df = pd.DataFrame(data=conditions_choices, columns=['conditions', 'choices'])
    transactions['partyName'] = np.select(df['conditions'], df['choices'], default=transactions.partyName)

    conditions_choices = [
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^ME DC SI.*NET", na=False, case=False) , "Netflix"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^ME DC SI.*AMAZON", na=False, case=False) , "Amazon Prime"]
    ]

    df = pd.DataFrame(data=conditions_choices, columns=['conditions', 'choices'])
    transactions['partyName'] = np.select(df['conditions'], df['choices'], default=transactions.partyName)

    transactions['party2'] = transactions['partyName'].replace(to_replace=" ", value="", regex=True)

    return transactions
